---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case. What are you trying to do?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see? API sketches, examples welcome.

## Alternatives considered

What else have you tried or thought about?

## Additional context

Anything else relevant — links to similar features in other libraries,
references, etc.
